title: Social Media Marketing: Leverage Instagram For Illustrators
description:
By the end of this course, you will be able to strategically curate your Instagram content, categorize and schedule posts with intention, build an engaged creative community, and reach new audiences beyond vanity metrics.

In Social Media Marketing: Leveraging Instagram for Illustrators, illustrator Jess Miller shares how she uses Instagram as a true marketing tool—one that drives 90% of her client inquiries. This course is designed for illustrators and visual artists who want to move beyond likes and follows and start attracting real opportunities, collaborators, and brand partnerships.

You’ll learn how to curate content that reflects your niche, organize and schedule posts for consistency, foster meaningful community engagement, and expand your reach with purpose. Jess also walks you through a practical process reel demonstration so you can see these strategies in action.

This course is ideal for illustrators with an existing body of work and a basic understanding of Instagram. To be successful, you should already be creating and sharing artwork online. If you’re ready to transform your profile into a magnet for aligned clients and creative growth, this class will show you how.
